title: combretum aureonitens
intro: Combretum aureonitens, also known as the yellow-leaved combretum or golden-leaved bushwillow, is a species of flowering plant in the family Combretaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in African medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Combretum aureonitens is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its bark is also used to make a medicinal extract.
